data.name: SEX, SIN & ROCK'N'ROLL 🤘🎸
data.detailed_description:
SEX, SIN & ROCK’N’ROLL is a 3D visual novel with side-scroller exploration, mixing rock music, mysticism, dark humor, and pure chaos into a story about fame, temptation, and the price of success.

You play as a shy, broke musician stuck with his band in a dead-end city that slowly crushes dreams. Everything changes the moment you buy an old guitar — one that shouldn’t exist. From it emerges a seductive demoness who offers you a deal: instant success, packed venues, screaming fans… in exchange for their energy.

The contract will be completed the day you become a true rock star. But the brighter your stage persona shines, the more your real self begins to fade. Explore the city in a 3D side-scroller format, dive into bars, clubs, and strange mystical corners, and meet colorful characters who either push you toward fame or try to pull you back from the edge.
Write songs, craft tracks, rehearse with your band, and perform live in rhythm-game concerts where every show brings you closer to glory — or total self-destruction. Your choices shape relationships, story branches, and one of several endings. No matter the path, you must gain enough popularity to play the final concert, leave the city behind, and make the ultimate choice: break the demonic contract or fully embrace your dark rock-star alter ego.


Key Features


🤘 3D side-scroller exploration with interactive locations and story events

🎸 Rhythm-game concerts where your performance truly matters

🔞 Adult (18+) content, including erotic scenes, provocative dialogue, and temptation-driven encounters

🖤 Bold, edgy tone packed with dark humor, absurdity, and rock’n’roll attitude

🎤 Branching story with multiple endings, shaped by your choices and lifestyle

data.short_description: SEX, SIN & ROCK’N’ROLL is a 3D visual novel with side-scroller exploration where a cursed guitar offers fame for a price. Write songs, play rhythm concerts, face adult temptations, and choose between becoming a rock god or saving your soul. 🤘
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 越南文, 希臘文, 丹麥文, 簡體中文, 繁體中文, 韓文, 挪威文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 羅馬尼亞文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 匈牙利文, 烏克蘭文, 芬蘭文, 捷克文, 瑞典文, 日文, 印尼語, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or above
  • 處理器: Intel or AMD
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Direct X compatible
  • 儲存空間: 15 GB 可用空間
